title: Miracle-Gro Pour and Feed Liquid Plant Food, 1L
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Grows plants twice as big Feed your plants the nutrients they need to grow twice as big (versus unfed plants)! The superfood for your plants Contains Humifirst which is rich in organic matter - stimulating growth and root formation. Visible results in 7 days The easy way to enjoy healthier, happier, more bountiful plants in just 7 days. Pet and child friendly Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. Next page 1 Grows Twice As Big 2 Superfood For Your Plants 3 Results In 7 Days 4 Pet & Child Friendly Miracle-Gro plant food is renowned for its ‘grows twice as big’ results A ready to use liquid plant food formula containing a growth stimulant rich in organic matter. Miracle-Gro Plant Food Liquid - Pour & Feed is the superfood your plant needs. Creates bountiful plants, flowers and vegetables by stimulating growth and yield, root formation and improving resistance to environmental stresses. Guaranteed visibly healthier, happier plants in just 7 days. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Plant Food Liquid - Pour & Feed? Plants need more than just water, they need the right balance of essential nutrients to grow and bloom their best. Miracle-Gro feeds your plants the nutrients they need that are ​easily absorbed to grow your plants twice as big versus unfed plants! Where can I use Miracle-Gro Plant Food Liquid - Pour & Feed? Perfect for pots and containers, hanging baskets, beds and borders. Miracle-Gro Plant Food Liquid - Pour & Feed can be used indoors and outdoors. Suitable for use as directed in areas where children and pets have access. When should I use Miracle-Gro Plant Food Liquid - Pour & Feed? For outdoor plants, use Miracle-Gro Plant Food Liquid - Pour & Feed between March and September, when plants are actively growing. For indoor plants, can be used all year round when plants are actively growing. How do I use Miracle-Gro Plant Food Liquid - Pour & Feed? Add Miracle-Gro Plant Food Liquid - Pour & Feed directly to the moist compost around the plants. Use between 1 and 4 capfuls depending upon the size of the pot (see dosage guide on pack). Feed every 7 days. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Shake bottle vigorously before use. Dilute solution according to label instructions. Apply solution to soil around plant. Wear gloves and protective clothing when handling. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. In case of accidental contact, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice. Do not ingest. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat sources and direct sunlight. Dispose of container in accordance with local regulations.
